summary: A split-screen State of the Union excerpt: Trump speaks at the House rostrum on the left while a designed blue graphic panel on the right reads 'END. SANCTUARY. CITIES.' with a 'Law & Order / 2026 State of the Union' footer. The audio is the speech itself (calling to end sanctuary cities and penalize officials who block removals), not a music track. It is a speech clip dressed with a slogan graphic rather than a music-driven cinematic montage, so it does not meet the produced youth-spectacle bar.
notable_text: END. SANCTUARY. CITIES.; LAW & ORDER; 2026 STATE OF THE UNION; STATE of the UNION
